home.returning_empty_message: Create one habit to begin building a calmer, brighter record of your progress.
home.active_constellation_hint: This is the constellation StarNyx opens to when you come back.
home.sheet_helper: Choose a constellation to switch focus quickly.
home.checkin_error_message: Couldn't update this day right now.
home.load_error_message: Your local data couldn't be loaded. Try again in a moment.

welcome.subtitle: Start a new constellation for the habit you want to keep in view.
welcome.pending_flow: The constellation form couldn't open right now.

starnyx_form.title_hint: What do you want to stay consistent with?
starnyx_form.title_error_too_long: Title must be 60 characters or fewer
starnyx_form.description_hint: Add a short note to make this constellation clear
starnyx_form.save_error: Unable to save the StarNyx right now. Please try again.
starnyx_form.delete_confirm_message: This removes the StarNyx and its related local progress data.
starnyx_form.delete_error: Unable to delete the StarNyx right now. Please try again.

journal.title: Journal
journal.today_hint: Write a quick note about today...
journal.empty_message: Capture a short note after today's check-in so you can remember how the day felt.
journal.delete_confirm_message: This will permanently remove this journal entry.
journal.save_general_error: Unable to save the journal entry right now. Please try again.
journal.delete_general_error: Unable to delete the journal entry right now. Please try again.
journal.load_error_message: Unable to load journal entries right now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.export_hint: Save your StarNyx data as a local JSON file.
settings.import_hint: Replace local data with a StarNyx backup file.
settings.import_pending: Import from file is not available in this build yet.
settings.about_mission_content: StarNyx helps you build steady habits through a quiet, focused experience. Progress should feel visible without becoming noisy.
settings.about_privacy_content: Your data stays on your device. No accounts, no tracking, and no cloud sync are required to use StarNyx.
settings.about_experience_content: Inspired by the night sky, the interface is designed to stay light, calm, and intentional so your daily ritual stays front and center.
